'''hadhusu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:dobson|dobson]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-dh-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:dobson|dobson]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| hadhusu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:hædhisith|hædhisith]] || [[word:hædhisij|hædhisij]] || [[word:hædhisish|hædhisish]] || [[word:hædhisi|hædhisi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:hadhudhusuth|hadhudhusuth]] || [[word:hadhudhusuj|hadhudhusuj]] || [[word:hadhudhusush|hadhudhusush]] || [[word:hadhudhusu|hadhudhusu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:hadhusuth|hadhusuth]] || [[word:hadhusuj|hadhusuj]] || [[word:hadhusush|hadhusush]] || [[word:hadhusu|hadhusu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:hadhufsuth|hadhufsuth]] || [[word:hadhufsuj|hadhufsuj]] || [[word:hadhufsush|hadhufsush]] || [[word:hadhufsuf|hadhufsuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:hadhusuthu|hadhusuthu]] || [[word:hadhusuju|hadhusuju]] || [[word:hadhusushu|hadhusushu]] || [[word:hadhusuku|hadhusuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:hadhusuth|hadhusuth]] || [[word:hadhusuj|hadhusuj]] || [[word:hadhusush|hadhusush]] || [[word:hadhusu|hadhusu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:hadhusuthul|hadhusuthul]] || [[word:hadhusujul|hadhusujul]] || [[word:hadhusushul|hadhusushul]] || [[word:hadhusukul|hadhusukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:hadhusuthuthu|hadhusuthuthu]] || [[word:hadhusujuju|hadhusujuju]] || [[word:hadhusushushu|hadhusushushu]] || [[word:hadhusuku|hadhusuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:hadhusuthun|hadhusuthun]] || [[word:hadhusujun|hadhusujun]] || [[word:hadhusushun|hadhusushun]] || [[word:hadhusukun|hadhusukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:hadhusuthuoro|hadhusuthuoro]] || [[word:hadhusujuoro|hadhusujuoro]] || [[word:hadhusushuoro|hadhusushuoro]] || [[word:hadhusukuoro|hadhusukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|16f482d}}
